# AutoGenerated by MkProject.py v1.0
# CMakeLists.txt
set(CMAKE_OSX_ARCHITECTURES arm64)
set(CMAKE_OSX_SYSROOT macosx)
cmake_minimum_required(VERSION 3.30)
set(PROJECT_NAME gbemu)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD 23)
set(CMAKE_CXX_STANDARD_REQUIRED TRUE)
set(BINARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${CMAKE_SOURCE_DIR}/bin)
set(CMAKE_RUNTIME_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${BINARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})
set(CMAKE_LIBRARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${BINARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})
set(CMAKE_ARCHIVE_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY ${BINARY_OUTPUT_DIRECTORY})
project(${PROJECT_NAME} CXX)
# Set CMake Build Type
set(CMAKE_BUILD_TYPE Debug)
find_package(raylib CONFIG REQUIRED)
find_package(glm CONFIG REQUIRED)
find_package(spdlog CONFIG REQUIRED)
find_package(fmt CONFIG REQUIRED)
find_package(glfw3 CONFIG REQUIRED)
include(FetchContent)
FetchContent_Declare(
    rlimgui
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/raylib-extras/rlImGui.git
    GIT_TAG main
)
FetchContent_Declare(
    imgui
    GIT_REPOSITORY https://github.com/ocornut/imgui.git
    GIT_TAG docking
)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(imgui)
FetchContent_MakeAvailable(rlimgui)
add_library(rlimgui STATIC
    ${rlimgui_SOURCE_DIR}/rlImGui.cpp
)
target_include_directories(rlimgui PUBLIC
    SYSTEM ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR} 
    SYSTEM ${rlimgui_SOURCE_DIR}
        SYSTEM /opt/homebrew/include
)
file(GLOB INSTRUCTION_SOURCES
    src/instructions/*.cpp
)
add_executable(${PROJECT_NAME}
    src/main.cpp
    src/emulator.cpp
    src/globals.cpp

    ${INSTRUCTION_SOURCES}
)
target_include_directories(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    include
)
file(GLOB IMGUI_SRC
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/*.cpp
    ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}/misc/cpp/imgui_stdlib.cpp
)
add_library(imgui STATIC
    ${IMGUI_SRC}
)
target_include_directories(imgui PUBLIC
    SYSTEM ${imgui_SOURCE_DIR}
)
target_link_libraries(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE raylib spdlog::spdlog fmt::fmt imgui rlimgui glfw)
target_compile_options(${PROJECT_NAME} PRIVATE
    -Wall 
    -Wextra 
    -Wpedantic 
    -fno-strict-aliasing # there's a lot of goofy hacks based using this
)
